title: Xiphion histrio
taxonomy: Xiphion histrio is a species of flowering plant in the asphodel family (Asphodelaceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in countries such as Greece, Turkey, and the Balkans. The plant is classified as a bulbous perennial, characterized by its slender, linear leaves and yellow or white flowers. Xiphion histrio is often found in dry, rocky areas and is considered a rare and endangered species in some parts of its range. Its classification also places it within the subfamily Asphodeloideae, which includes other plants like Asphodelus and Eremurus.
